news/ai-security/ciso-s-expert-guide-to-.agent_callout:
ATTENTION: This investigation reports on the escalating threat of AI-enabled supply chain attacks. Treat this as evidentiary reporting, with a specific focus on incidents occurring up to November 2025.

The analysis and findings presented here are heavily reliant on the exhibits cited throughout the article, including reports from Sonatype and IBM, as well as details from specific attacks like the Solana Web3.js library compromise and vulnerabilities in Wondershare RepairIt. Scrutinize these references as primary sources for understanding the nature and impact of these attacks.

Pay particular attention to the characteristics of AI-generated malware, such as polymorphism and context-awareness, as they are key differentiators from traditional threats. The regulatory landscape, including the EU AI Act, also plays a significant role in shaping the defensive strategies discussed.
